method: ollama_verify_claims cross-family cloud PoLL — panel deepseek-v4-pro:cloud / glm-5.2:cloud / minimax-m3:cloud (family-disjoint from the Anthropic synthesizer), reasoning-stripped claims, judged vs verbatim abstracts/primary excerpts served as source_paths, lone-dissent-never-decides (min_refute 2, CONFIRMED needs >=2 confirms)

NARROWED_TO_CONFIRMED_CORE.F13: protocol-for-test-selection confirmed; specific test prescriptions are body-level — design uses standard exact-test statistics + memo-verified Card power
NARROWED_TO_CONFIRMED_CORE.F14: IRT + Fisher-information item selection for discriminative utility confirmed; the specific drop-threshold detail is body-level
NARROWED_TO_CONFIRMED_CORE.F15: replicability-analysis framework for multiple comparisons confirmed; juror correction: the contribution is partial-conjunction (Simes-based) AS SUPERIOR TO Bonferroni
NARROWED_TO_CONFIRMED_CORE.F16: six objective harmonization metrics + 202-participant listening study on 9,226 pairs confirmed; metric-category names are body-level
NARROWED_TO_CONFIRMED_CORE.F17: pseudo-Gibbs + user-pinned constraints + Bach-style generation confirmed; the discrimination-test eval detail is body-level
NARROWED_TO_CONFIRMED_CORE.F21: RL fine-tuning with domain-specific incentives on pretrained note-RNN improving structure confirmed; music-theory-rule specifics body-level; NOTE: later arXiv versions retitle to Sequence Tutor
NARROWED_TO_CONFIRMED_CORE.F22: Schenkerian-hierarchical + graph diffusion + human-experiment superiority confirmed; the rule-based screening detail is body-level
NARROWED_TO_CONFIRMED_CORE.F26: absolute/relative set-comparison strategy confirmed; the exhaustive cross-validation methodology detail is paper-body-level

CORROBORATIVE_DEMOTED.F4: MAESTRO negative claim (no beat/score annotations) unprovable from abstract; not load-bearing
CORROBORATIVE_DEMOTED.F5: Music Transformer serialization/eval details body-level; implication carried by confirmed F1/F2/F3

ESCALATED_MANUAL.F28: Theiler 1992 surrogate-data: existence+attribution oracle-confirmed (Crossref); no abstract deterministically retrievable this session; groundedness pending manual full-text; demoted to corroborative — control redesign rests on confirmed F24/F27/F29

REUSED_FROM_MEMO_JURY.F31: Card et al. 2020 + van Miltenburg et al. 2021 (memo jury 2026-07-13)

attributionNotes: F2: groove_consistency ships in MusPy (Dong et al. 2020) but the metric internally cites Wu & Yang 2020
F21: arXiv:1611.02796 later versions retitled Sequence Tutor
F29: juror attribution query on Laban et al. — ACL page lists Laban, Dai, Bandarkar, Hearst (agent attribution correct)
degradedRuns: 3 runs had 1 juror excluded (no_valid_verdicts) — flagged by the tool, never silently counted; all such verdicts met the 2-confirm threshold with the remaining jurors
honestCeiling: CONFIRMED on frontier-authored claims is corroboration, not proof; the panel is weaker on subtle errors than gross ones.
